meta.title: Can the US overcome China's MASSIVE shipbuilding advantage?
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

The United States Navy may be the most technologically advanced and broadly capable seafaring service on this planet, but in terms of sheer numbers, America’s globe-spanning Navy pales in comparison to the maritime juggernaut that is China. 

So, what can America do to turn the shipbuilding tide? Let's discuss.
